title: Coverage
excerpt: Understand what is included, where support applies, and how service boundaries work.
author: Arthur Smith

content.text: Our coverage includes 24/7 support for all critical issues, with a guaranteed response time of under 1 hour. We provide assistance for software bugs, hardware failures, and network issues within the scope of our service agreement.

While we strive to provide comprehensive support, there are certain boundaries to our services. We do not cover issues caused by third-party software or hardware that is not part of our standard offerings. Additionally, we do not provide support for user errors or unauthorized modifications to our products.

content.caption: Visual representation of our coverage areas.

content.text: Our goal is to ensure that you have the support you need when you need it, while also maintaining clear boundaries to provide the best service possible.
